response.justification: A strong, versatile senior engineer with broad experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus genuine IDE exposure (C/C++ work on NI LabWindows/CVI, a C IDE). However, the role demands deep JVM expertise with Java, Kotlin, and the Spring ecosystem, and the resume shows only peripheral Java use (alongside DLang on robotics/orchestration tools), no Kotlin, no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate, and no recent JVM or language-tooling work. The core required stack is largely absent, making this a poor fit despite solid general engineering credentials.
strengths: Direct IDE-internals experience building C/C++ components for the LabWindows/CVI C IDE
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, large-scale low-latency systems (millions of req/s)
Versatile, polyglot full-stack background with proven complex-systems delivery
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise-Java framework experience
Minimal Java depth and no Kotlin; primary stacks are TypeScript/Node and DLang
No recent JVM-ecosystem or language-tooling work relevant to the role
